expected_outcome: Competent enterprise Java developer proficient in core language features, OOP design patterns, Maven, JDBC, and building backend services with Spring Boot.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily of coding core algorithm practices on platforms like LeetCode or Codewars.

mini_project.title: Grade Calculator & Currency Converter
mini_project.description: Console applications implementing business logic using control flow, scanners for user input, and arrays to store transactional records.

phases.milestone: Mastered basic Java programming concepts, compiler behavior, and standard CLI-based inputs/outputs.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily designing class structures and implementing object-oriented solutions.

mini_project.title: Employee Management System
mini_project.description: An OOP application representing different employee types (FullTime, PartTime, Contractor) using polymorphism, encapsulation, and error handling.

phases.milestone: Strong command of OOP principles, custom exceptions, package structures, and Java's memory allocation model.

phases.phase_title: Phase 3: Collections, Generics & Advanced Core Features
phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily practicing functional programming patterns with Streams and file manipulation.

mini_project.title: Inventory Parser & Multi-threaded Downloader
mini_project.description: An application reading products from CSV, filtering and grouping them using Streams, and a multi-threaded image downloader.

phases.milestone: Proficient with Java's extensive collections library, lambdas, streams, basic concurrency, and modern File APIs.

phases.practice_schedule: 2.5 Hours daily building REST APIs and mapping database entities using JPA.

mini_project.title: Todo REST API with Spring Boot
mini_project.description: A REST service containing endpoints to add, retrieve, update, and delete tasks connected to an H2 or PostgreSQL database.

phases.milestone: Equipped to configure Java web applications, interact with databases via JDBC/JPA, and build robust RESTful APIs.

major_projects.title: E-Commerce Backend Microservice
major_projects.description: A Spring Boot backend application featuring secure user registration/login (Spring Security & JWT), product management, order processing, database persistence, and integration testing with JUnit and Mockito.

major_projects.title: Bank Transaction Processing System
major_projects.description: A transactional console/REST system implementing thread-safe money transfers, auditing logs using Spring AOP, database transaction management (@Transactional), and CSV statements exporting functionality.
